title: dissotis cornifolia
intro: Dissotis cornifolia, also known as the horned dissotis or horned waterhemp, is a perennial aquatic plant that belongs to the family Melastomataceae. This plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Dissotis cornifolia include its potential to treat fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems are typically used to make infusions or decoctions, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
